## The Concern: The Data Wall and the Energy Bill

But there is a problem with the “just make it bigger” strategy: we are running out of internet.

Research from Epoch AI suggests that we could exhaust the stock of high-quality human text data between 2026 and 2032. You cannot train a model on the entire internet twice.
